# GitHub Repository Metadata

Paste these into GitHub's repo settings (About section, top-right of the repo page) when you publish.

## Description (160 chars max)

```
Self-hosted GitHub trending explorer with watchlist scoring, radar mode, galaxy discovery, release tracking, and an optional OpenClaw / script API.
```

## Website

```
http://localhost:4200
```

(Update to your deployed URL once hosted.)

## Social preview

GitHub lets you upload a custom Open Graph image under **Settings → Social preview**.

Suggested image: a 1280×640 crop of the Galaxy view screenshot (`docs/screenshots/galaxy.png`), or a composite of all three views.

Recommended tool: Figma or Canva — place the screenshot on a dark background with the app name in white text.
